use_cases: Website navigation to display user location within site hierarchy
E-commerce product pages to show category and subcategory paths
Admin dashboards to indicate current section and allow quick navigation upward
Documentation sites to show article hierarchy and nesting levels
File managers to display current directory path with clickable segments
ai_summary: A clean, accessible breadcrumb navigation component built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS following shadcn/ui patterns. Features configurable sizes (sm/default/lg), multiple page variants (default/highlighted/muted), and customizable separators. Supports composition via asChild prop for advanced use cases like integrating with routing libraries.
